title: Implement serializable Job Driver state machines
summary: Implement explicit serializable Job and Driver state machines, interruption policies, cancellation cleanup, structured failures and save fields.
acceptance: Job drivers expose explicit enter, tick, complete, fail, cancel and save fields with no Promise or Generator execution position
Interruption policies Never, AtSafePoint, Immediate and EmergencyOnly share cleanup for reservation and carried state
Structured reason codes distinguish permission, material, reservation, path, risk, time and target-state failures
Save/load round trip resumes a job at the same explicit step and preserves world hash

history.details: Implemented explicit serializable JobCore state machines, interruption cleanup, structured failure reasons, snapshot/hash helpers, jobs tests, replay check, docs and report.
